slides.title: No 30-minute *rush*
slides.body: You don't need a shake the second you rack.

slides.title: *Total* protein wins
slides.body: Daily protein matters far more than timing.

slides.title: It's *hours* wide
slides.body: You have hours around training, not minutes.

slides.title: Eat a *real meal*
slides.body: A normal meal within a few hours is plenty.

slides.title: Stop *stressing*
slides.body: Hit your daily numbers and you're fine.

slides.title: Forget the *window*.
slides.body: Vibe Health counts your daily protein automatically.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
The anabolic window is a myth. 💪
